MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ASTER CUCINE S.P.A.'s Motion For Order Authorizing Substituted Service On Secretary Of State.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Aster Cucine S.P.A's motion for order authorizing substitute service on secretary of state is off calendar. Such applications are to be made to the Presiding Judge in department 206 per SF Local Rule 3.1C.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
